llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final plan includes four main components: (1) Physical and Mental (ExecutiveGlobal Platinum) health coverage, (2) Home Contents and Business Equipment property coverage, (3) Global Executive-Level travel coverage, and (4) Premium Membership and Executive Liability Protection. To map these to the ground-truth ratings, we identify the closest corresponding options. For health coverage, 'ExecutiveGlobal Platinum' suggests a combined physical and mental premium plan equivalent to 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (physical, rating 10) and 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (mental, rating 10). For property coverage, 'Home Contents and Business Equipment' aligns best with 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' (rating 7) as it covers replacement value and global protection for home and business equipment. For travel coverage, 'Global Executive-Level Coverage' matches 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10), which is the top-tier global travel insurance. For additional services, 'Premium Membership and Executive Liability Protection' corresponds to 'Premium Insurance Membership' (rating 10) because it includes concierge services and priority claims processing. Therefore, the mapped ratings are as follows.
